activity-1-title: Selection of the data at hand
activity-1-description: Identify all relevant datasets. Choose the dataset whose quality will be assessed.
activity-2-description: Analyze all organizational elements linked to the data (systems, metadata, etc.). Document any aspect that impacts or is impacted.
activity-3-description: Identify and record all data quality issues found so far or discovered during analysis.
activity-4-description: Define the context model using the context metamodel. Outline its components based on analyzed elements.
activity-5-description: Perform data profiling to detect trends, patterns, and outliers. Use context insights to refine data analysis.
activity-6-description: Estimate data quality based on identified issues and profiling results. Determine priorities and potential workload.
activity-7-description: Update the context model with new findings. Revise DQ requirements, business rules, or metadata as needed.
